name: DeathMatch
author: ice@primalheaven.com
description: Legacy The Isle deathmatch dedicated server (app 1020410, non-Evrima). No Steam beta branch.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Legacy Isle (1020410) — no Evrima beta
apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl wget file tar lib32gcc-s1

mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sqL "https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz" | tar zxvf -
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps

export HOME=/mnt/server
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

STEAM_USER=${STEAM_USER:-anonymous}
STEAM_PASS=${STEAM_PASS:-}
SRCDS_APPID=${SRCDS_APPID:-1020410}

./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login "${STEAM_USER}" "${STEAM_PASS}" +app_update "${SRCDS_APPID}" validate +quit

mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
if [ -f /mnt/server/Steam/steamapps/common/Steamworks\ SDK\ Redist/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then
    cp /mnt/server/Steam/steamapps/common/Steamworks\ SDK\ Redist/linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
fi

echo "Legacy Isle install complete"

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Legacy The Isle dedicated server (do not use Evrima beta)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Run SteamCMD update on each server start

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam username for SteamCMD (anonymous for dedicated server)

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: Leave empty to use the default legacy Isle binary and ports
